auth.name: Full name
auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back — sign in to continue
auth.registerSubtitle: Track and categorize your card expenses

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noData: No data for the selected filters. Import a statement to get started.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.name: Name
expenses.excludeHint: Uncheck to exclude this expense from the dashboard totals and charts
expenses.empty: No expenses found. Try adjusting the filters or import a statement.
expenses.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected record(s)? This cannot be undone.
expenses.recurringHint: Generated automatically from a fixed expense

recurring.title: Fixed Expenses
recurring.subtitle: Recurring expenses (rent, subscriptions, insurance) generated automatically on schedule
recurring.startDateHint: Expenses are generated from the start date up to today; a past start date backfills the history.
recurring.empty: No fixed expenses yet. Create one and it will be added to your expenses automatically.
recurring.deleteConfirm: Delete this fixed expense? Already generated expenses are kept.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Payments and credits that reduce your balance (not counted as spending)
payments.empty: No payments found for the selected filters.

import.title: Import statement
import.subtitle: Upload a bank statement in Excel (.xls / .xlsx) or CSV format
import.dropHint: Drag & drop the file here or click to browse
import.duplicatesSkipped: {{count}} duplicate transaction(s) were already imported and skipped
import.suggestCategories: Suggest a category for each expense based on the merchant
import.suggestCategoriesHint: Uncategorized merchants get a category assigned automatically (e.g. SHELL → Fuel). You can change any assignment later in Expense Concepts.
import.autoCategorizedDetail: {{count}} merchant(s) were automatically assigned a category
import.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{filename}}" and its {{rows}} imported transaction(s)? This cannot be undone.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Create the catalog of categories you assign expenses to
categories.name: Name
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? Expenses will become uncategorized.
categories.empty: No categories yet. Create your first one.

concepts.title: Expense Concepts
concepts.subtitle: Assign each merchant / expense concept to a category
concepts.name: Concept / merchant
concepts.empty: No concepts yet. Import a statement to populate this list.
concepts.newCategoryFor: Create a category and assign it here
concepts.autoAssignHint: Suggest and assign a category to every uncategorized merchant based on its name
concepts.autoAssigned: {{count}} merchant(s) were automatically assigned a category
concepts.autoAssignedNone: No suggestions found for the uncategorized merchants
concepts.autoAssignRemaining: {{count}} merchant(s) remain uncategorized — assign them manually
